title: Software Update - DFU - Headset at low battery - Software update tab in device settings
scenario: DFU blocked with pop-up when headset battery is below 5%, even if unplugged during update
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on Android
Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings
Scroll to and tap on 'Firmware Update' or 'DFU' option
Observe the headset battery level indicator (ensure it is below 5%)
Attempt to initiate the firmware update
Observe the pop-up message displayed on screen
Plug the headset into a charger while battery is still below 5%
Attempt to initiate the firmware update again
While the update is in progress (if available), unplug the headset from the charger while battery remains below 5%
Observe the behavior and any pop-up messages
expected: When headset battery is below 5%, the app displays a pop-up: "Update currently not available, please try back later" and blocks the DFU. When the headset is plugged into a charger while below 5%, the update becomes available. If the headset is unplugged during the update while still below 5%, the update is blocked again with the same pop-up message.
